name: The Computational Basis of Confidence in Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.12447v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reliable confidence -- the probability that a model's own answer is correct -- is essential for the trustworthy deployment of language models. Exis...
description: arXiv:2607.12447v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reliable confidence -- the probability that a model's own answer is correct -- is essential for the trustworthy deployment of language models. Existing work has largely evaluated confidence by how well it predicts correctness and whether it is calibrated, leaving open a more fundamental question: what does the confidence signal itself represent?...
author: Dharshan Kumaran, Viorica Patraucean, Maks Ovsanikov, Petar Veli\v{c}kovi\'c, Nathaniel Daw
